arts.ttl: Everton vs Crystal Palace: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two of six winless teams do battle in the Premier League this weekend as Everton welcome Crystal Palace to Goodison Park. Everton secured their first point of the season away at Leicester last weekend having lost their opening four games of the new campaign.
